incorrect_clinical_logic_evaluation: Agent correctly retrieved data but reached an incorrect conclusion based on clinical thresholds.
failed_to_retrieve_data: Agent failed to find the requested data and returned a placeholder or error code.
excessive_redundant_queries: Agent entered a loop of redundant or non-productive search queries without finding the target data.
patient_reference_format_error: Agent returned a raw value instead of the required FHIR-compliant reference or formatted string.
unnecessary_action_performed: Agent performed a write action (e.g., ServiceRequest) when the task only required data retrieval.
incorrect_dosage_calculation: Agent performed the correct logic but calculated the medication dose incorrectly.
